name: Section 125 Cafeteria Plans
fullDescription: Our IRS Section 125 Cafeteria Plan administration provides employees with the opportunity to select benefits on a pre-tax basis, reducing their taxable income and increasing take-home pay. We handle plan design, compliance testing, claims processing, and employee education to ensure seamless implementation.
features: Plan document review and IRS compliance
benefits: Employees save on average 20-30% through pre-tax contributions

name: Flexible Spending Accounts (FSA)
description: Pre-tax options for healthcare and dependent care expenses.
fullDescription: Flexible Spending Accounts allow employees to set aside pre-tax dollars for qualified healthcare and dependent care expenses. Our comprehensive FSA administration includes enrollment management, claims processing, and reimbursement options including direct deposit and debit cards.
features: Healthcare and Dependent Care FSA options
Daily, weekly, semi-monthly, or monthly reimbursement schedules
Paper check, electronic deposit, or debit card reimbursement
benefits: Average family saves $2,500+ annually through FSA tax advantages

name: COBRA Administration
fullDescription: We manage all aspects of COBRA continuation coverage, ensuring your organization remains fully compliant with federal requirements. From eligibility determination through premium collection and claims coordination, our team handles the complete administration.
benefits: Reduce compliance risk and administrative burden

name: Employee Benefits Communication
description: Clear, engaging education for benefit decisions.
fullDescription: Educational communication is essential for employees to make informed benefit decisions. Our experienced Benefits Representatives conduct one-on-one and group meetings, provide enrollment materials, and offer ongoing support to ensure employees understand and maximize their benefits.
benefits: Higher employee engagement and benefits satisfaction

name: Electronic Enrollment Platform
fullDescription: Our modern electronic enrollment platform simplifies the benefits selection process for both employers and employees. The system streamlines data collection, integrates with payroll, generates compliance reports, and provides employees with 24/7 access to enrollment resources.
benefits: Faster enrollment, fewer errors, better data accuracy

name: Retirement Planning & Annuities
description: Strategic planning for long-term financial security.
fullDescription: We provide comprehensive retirement planning services including 403(b) and 457(b) plan administration, annuity selection, and individual retirement strategy development. Our financial professionals help employees build secure retirement portfolios through diverse investment options.
benefits: Employees achieve retirement confidence and financial security

name: Major Medical & Supplemental Plans
fullDescription: We partner with leading carriers to provide major medical insurance, supplemental health plans, accident coverage, and critical illness protection. Our plans fill coverage gaps and provide financial security against unexpected healthcare costs.
benefits: Complete healthcare protection for employees and families

name: Compliance & Administration
fullDescription: Our compliance expertise ensures your organization meets all federal and state benefits regulations. We provide continuous monitoring, documentation, amendment preparation, and regulatory guidance to keep your benefits programs fully compliant.
benefits: Avoid penalties and ensure peace of mind with complete compliance

name: Call Center Support
description: Live benefits counseling and employee support.
fullDescription: Our dedicated call center provides live support to employees during business hours with prompt callback service for after-hours inquiries. Employees speak directly with knowledgeable representatives who provide benefits counseling, claim status updates, and enrollment assistance.
features: Live representative support during business hours
After-hours message callbacks next business day
benefits: Employees get answers fast from real people
